report.summary: Cycle-close: no new commits since e3f63fc. 2 files modified + 2 new OG images uncommitted. 630 published pages, 109 missing page.tsx (known backlog). All 6 data APIs structurally healthy. Build crashes in sandbox (OOM) but passes on Vercel (8GB heap). No blockers.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 630 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 109 missing page.tsx files (wallets, investing/best, taxes, learn, blog, courses — unchanged from prior cycle)
2 files modified since last commit: StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026/page.tsx
2 new OG images added: og-crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026.svg, og-crypto-staking-2026.svg
141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking — ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts): structured-data.examples.ts (syntax), 3 learn pages (JSX)
PUBLISH_QUEUE empty — no pending promotions this cycle
No new regressions detected vs prior cycle

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API route.ts files present and structurally valid
prices (60s TTL), trending (5m), fear-greed (10m), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (5m), defi-yields (5m) — all using stale-while-revalidate
market-dominance has FALLBACK_DATA constant (best practice). Other routes rely on stale cache fallback only
defi-yields still lacks hardcoded fallback data — resilience gap carried over from prior cycle
No API route changes since last commit — stable
No rate-limit incidents or fallback triggers detected in code review

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit e3f63fc (2026-04-02 13:24 CET) should be deployed via Vercel auto-deploy
Build crashes in sandbox with Bus error (OOM in limited sandbox) — not indicative of Vercel build health
Vercel build config: ignoreBuildErrors:true, standalone output, 8GB heap, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4
2 uncommitted file modifications + 2 new OG SVGs — not yet deployed
No error spikes detected; prior build fix (3b2dd28) resolved use-client + metadata conflict

sections.title: Project Manager
items: This cycle: no new commits — delta is uncommitted edits to StablecoinYieldTracker and portfolio rebalancing guide + 2 OG images
Carry-over: 109 missing page.tsx files for published slugs (same backlog since batch deploy)
Carry-over: defi-yields API needs hardcoded fallback data for parity with other routes
Carry-over: 141 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts and 3 learn pages (cosmetic, non-blocking)
PUBLISH_QUEUE empty — next action is building out missing page.tsx files for published slugs
No blockers requiring Jefe's attention
